::: top-banner
:::

---
title: "Workshop Materials"
format: html
---

::: {.text-center}
# 📁 Workshop Materials
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
This section contains key documents, presentations, and shared reference materials related to the workshop.
:::

## 📄 Documents

- 📎 [Workshop Agenda (PDF)](workshop-agenda.pdf)
- 📎 [Save the Blue Five Project Summary (PDF)](https://example.com)
- 📎 [Workshop Overview Presentation (PDF)](https://example.com)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🧰 Technical Resources

- 🔗 [CESM Large Ensemble ocean downscaling workflow](https://github.com/IsaakBM/cesmle-ocn-fetch)
  Workflow and notes related to ocean-variable extraction, climate-model handling, and downscaling-oriented preparation relevant to the workshop's physical modeling discussions.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🎤 Presentations

- 🎞 [Isaac Brito-Morales - Project progress and integration overview](https://example.com)
- 🎞 [Lee Hannah / Sarayu Ramnath - Climate change vulnerability assessment](https://example.com)
- 🎞 [Mario Pardo / Ariadna Juarez - Dolphins](https://example.com)
- 🎞 [Yulia Egorova - Mesopelagic systems](https://example.com)
- 🎞 [Boris DeWitt - Physical modeling and regional context](https://example.com)
- 🎞 [Shaleyla Kelez - Sea turtles](https://example.com)
- 🎞 [Gabriel Vianna - Sharks and rays](https://example.com)
- 🎞 [Frank Garita - Marine mammals](https://example.com)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 📥 Looking for something?

Participants may continue to share presentations and documents for inclusion in this section. To add more files, please contact **[Isaac Brito-Morales](mailto:ibrito@conservation.org)**.
